# Range Medical — Full Service Details
> Regenerative medicine and health optimization clinic in Newport Beach, California.

## Clinic Information
- Name: Range Medical
- Address: 1901 Westcliff Dr. Suite 10, Newport Beach, CA 92660
- Phone: (949) 997-3988
- Website: https://www.range-medical.com
- Hours: Monday-Friday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM
- Google Rating: 5.0 stars (10 reviews)
- Providers: Licensed medical providers specializing in regenerative medicine

## Areas Served
Newport Beach (primary location), Costa Mesa (5 min), Irvine (15 min),
Huntington Beach (15 min), Laguna Beach (20 min), Dana Point (25 min),
San Clemente (30 min), Tustin (15 min), Lake Forest (20 min),
Mission Viejo (25 min), Laguna Niguel (20 min)

---

## Hormone Optimization (HRT)
- URL: https://www.range-medical.com/hormone-optimization
- Price: $250/month all-inclusive membership
- Includes: All hormone medications (testosterone, estrogen, progesterone, thyroid), monthly Range IV ($225 value), follow-up labs, direct provider access
- Initial labs: Essential Panel ($350) or Elite Panel ($750) billed separately
- Timeline: Sleep/energy improvements in 1-2 weeks, mood/clarity by week 3-4, body composition changes over 3-6 months
- Who it's for: People experiencing fatigue, brain fog, low motivation, mood changes, weight gain, poor sleep
- No contracts, month-to-month

### HRT FAQs
Q: Is hormone therapy safe?
A: When monitored by a licensed provider with regular labs, HRT is safe and effective for most people.

Q: How soon will I feel better?
A: Most patients notice improvements in energy and mood within 2-6 weeks.

Q: Do I need labs first?
A: Yes, we run comprehensive labs to understand your baseline and personalize your protocol.

---

## Medical Weight Loss
- URL: https://www.range-medical.com/weight-loss
- Medications: Tirzepatide (Mounjaro), Semaglutide (Ozempic/Wegovy), Retatrutide
- Approach: Physician-supervised with labs, personalized dosing, and ongoing support
- Results: Most patients lose 15-25% of body weight over 6-12 months
- Who it's for: People who have tried diets without long-term success, experience constant hunger, want data-driven medical supervision

### Weight Loss FAQs
Q: Which medication is right for me?
A: Your provider will recommend based on your labs, history, and goals. Most patients start with tirzepatide.

Q: Do I have to stay on it forever?
A: No. Many patients use GLP-1s for 6-12 months, then maintain with healthy habits.

---

## Peptide Therapy
- URL: https://www.range-medical.com/peptide-therapy
- Available peptides: BPC-157, TB-500, growth hormone peptides, immune support peptides
- Administration: Most are simple subcutaneous injections done at home
- Who it's for: Slow-healing injuries, poor workout recovery, sleep issues, performance optimization
- Timeline: BPC-157 often shows improvement in 2-4 weeks

### Peptide FAQs
Q: Are peptides safe?
A: When prescribed by a provider and sourced from licensed pharmacies, peptides have a strong safety profile.

Q: Do I have to inject myself?
A: Most peptides are subcutaneous (tiny needle). We teach you — it's easier than you think.

---

## IV Therapy
- URL: https://www.range-medical.com/iv-therapy
- Options: Custom vitamin infusions, NAD+ therapy, high-dose Vitamin C, glutathione, Build Your Own IV
- Duration: Most IVs take 30-60 minutes
- Walk-ins: Welcome for established patients
- Who it's for: Fatigue, immune support, athletic recovery, general wellness

---

## Hyperbaric Oxygen Therapy (HBOT)
- URL: https://www.range-medical.com/hyperbaric-oxygen-therapy
- Session length: 60-90 minutes
- Applications: Injury recovery, concussion/brain health, athletic performance, longevity
- Frequency: Acute issues 10-20 sessions, maintenance 1-4/month
- No downtime after sessions

---

## Red Light Therapy
- URL: https://www.range-medical.com/red-light-therapy
- Type: Medical-grade photobiomodulation panels
- Session length: 10-20 minutes
- Applications: Muscle recovery, joint pain, skin health, cellular energy
- Frequency: 3-5 times per week for best results
- Not a tanning bed — no UV, uses red and near-infrared wavelengths

---

## PRP Therapy
- URL: https://www.range-medical.com/prp-therapy
- Process: Blood draw, centrifuge to concentrate platelets, injection into treatment area
- Applications: Joint pain, tendon injuries, sports injuries, chronic pain
- Results: Many improve with one treatment, some conditions benefit from 2-3 sessions
- HSA/FSA eligible (documentation provided)

---

## Exosome Therapy
- URL: https://www.range-medical.com/exosome-therapy
- Administration: IV infusion (30-60 minutes)
- Applications: Systemic inflammation, anti-aging, brain health, tissue repair
- Timeline: Full benefits often emerge over 2-3 months
- Not the same as stem cells — exosomes are signaling molecules

---

## Lab Panels
- URL: https://www.range-medical.com/lab-panels
- Essential Panel: $350 — hormones, thyroid, metabolic basics
- Elite Panel: $750 — adds inflammation markers, advanced thyroid, longevity markers
- Results: 3-5 business days
- No fasting required for most panels
- Can get labs without committing to treatment

---

## Injection Therapy
- URL: https://www.range-medical.com/injection-therapy
- Options: B12, glutathione, amino acid shots
- Duration: Just a few minutes
- Walk-ins welcome for established patients

---

## Injury Recovery
- URL: https://www.range-medical.com/injury-recovery
- Treatments: PRP, peptides, exosomes, combination therapy
- Applications: Joint pain, tendon injuries, sports injuries, post-surgical recovery
- Most conditions improve with 1-3 treatments

---

## Getting Started
1. Book a Range Assessment: https://www.range-medical.com/range-assessment
2. The assessment covers your symptoms, goals, and medical history
3. Comprehensive lab work follows to understand your baseline
4. Your provider explains results and designs a personalized plan
5. Treatment begins with ongoing monitoring and adjustments
